title: La Haine
tmdbOverview: After a chaotic night of rioting in a marginal suburb of Paris, three young friends, Vinz, Hubert and Saïd, wander around unoccupied waiting for news about the state of health of a mutual friend who has been seriously injured when confronting the police.
synopsis: La Haine is a 1995 drama film from France. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a MA15+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
